title: Quiet Farm Animals
description: Makes all farm animals/mobs (cows, chickens, pigs and sheep) 50% quieter!
body:
This resource pack makes all farm animals/mobs (cows, chickens, pigs and sheeps) 50% quieter.

[Please report any bugs to me on discord](https://discord.com/users/761775444516929538)

Made by MrNoodleStroodle
